claim_boundary: Tier 5.19c is software-only fading-memory promotion/regression evidence. A pass can authorize a bounded fading-memory baseline only with full compact regression. It does not prove bounded nonlinear recurrence, hardware transfer, native on-chip temporal dynamics, universal benchmark superiority, language, planning, AGI, or ASI.

nonclaims: not language, planning, AGI, or ASI
classification.recommendation: Freeze a bounded v2.2 software baseline for multi-timescale fading-memory temporal state; do not claim nonlinear recurrence.

compact_child.name: v2_1_compact_regression_full
compact_child.purpose: rerun the current v2.1 promotion/regression guardrail before any temporal-substrate freeze

criteria.name: freeze compact backend is non-mock
criteria.rule: nest or brian2 required for freeze

controls: full temporal candidate as non-promoted reference
nonclaims: not language, planning, AGI, or ASI
fairness_contract.normalization: train-prefix z-score for tasks; online readout updates predict before target update

nonclaims: not language, planning, AGI, or ASI
summary.recommendation: Freeze a bounded v2.2 software baseline for multi-timescale fading-memory temporal state; do not claim nonlinear recurrence.
